# Remi

> Remi is the AI back-office teammate for owner-run businesses. Remi learns
> how each business works across connected email, calendars, messages, and
> business tools; finds work that needs attention; and moves it forward with
> the owner's approval. Nothing customer-facing goes out without approval,
> and every action comes with a receipt.

Remi is built for owner-run service businesses where the owner is doing the
work and running the back office: contractors, remodelers, home services,
auto shops, cleaning businesses, agencies, and similar companies.

Pro is $99 per month billed annually. Scale is $199 per month billed annually
and includes more work capacity. Both plans begin with a 7-day trial.

## Pages

- [Home](https://remi.new/): what Remi does and how to get started
- [Resources](https://remi.new/resources): practical guides for running an
  owner-run service business
- [Solutions](https://remi.new/solutions): industry guides for contractors,
  home services, auto repair shops, cleaning businesses, and agencies
- [Get Started](https://remi.new/start): text Remi and start the 7-day trial

- [RSS](https://remi.new/rss.xml)
